full_text:
Zhou Tai е·һжі°
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Zhou Tai (е·һжі°). Wei governor in Yue territory. Helped to secure victory against Zhuge Dan. Zhou Tai was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom. Zhou Tai lived during the Three Kingdoms period of Chinese history.
